info.name: text-delete
info.text: There are many things you need to learn in order to win the game of life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life, there are days when you're a winner and days when you're a loser.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: here is no type of game that can prepare you for the game of life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: There is nothing that can prepare you for the game that we call life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: One of the best ways to succeed at life is to build a great team around you.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Coming up with a good strategy will help you succeed in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Understanding the rules of life can be a very key asset.
